user_prompt: Guide me through standard template construct a diagnostics
prayer:

Anoint the standard template construct's interfaces with sacred oils to affirm diagnostic integrity.
Conclude with binaric affirmations, ensuring the construct's spirit aligns with the Machine God's will.

Test each articulated joint through ritual flexions, sanctifying preparation.
Seal the rite with electro-incantations, rendering the carapace armour impervious.
